And meanwhile, if you have some details for me about, you know, what you cover in the audits that you're performing right now.
Yeah.
And, you know, maybe share some brand names, some examples, or if you wanted to site call and ensure approximately the number of landing pages, that also works.
Okay, perfect.
Yeah, all right.
My intention is to understand, you know, how big or how small, mostly the brands that we're talking about.
Yeah, great.
Yeah.
All right.
Thank you.
Dan, thank you so much.
Have a good one.
You too.
Bye-bye.
Bye.

default_summary.markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Explore potential partnership between GrowthX and Botpresso for SEO audits and content strategy support](https://fathom.video/share/zVZJ3ZcycxTSLyhGyaX8q_AcyovSCE4Z?tab=summary&timestamp=19.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Botpresso specializes in technical SEO and could provide comprehensive SEO audits for GrowthX clients](https://fathom.video/share/zVZJ3ZcycxTSLyhGyaX8q_AcyovSCE4Z?tab=summary&timestamp=245.0)
  - [GrowthX is interested in subcontracting SEO audits to Botpresso, particularly for pre-launch clients](https://fathom.video/share/zVZJ3ZcycxTSLyhGyaX8q_AcyovSCE4Z?tab=summary&timestamp=732.0)
  - [Pricing model to be determined; Botpresso typically charges €100-150/hour for partnerships](https://fathom.video/share/zVZJ3ZcycxTSLyhGyaX8q_AcyovSCE4Z?tab=summary&timestamp=1005.0)
  - [Botpresso will create a SaaS-specific SEO audit checklist and pricing options for GrowthX to review](https://fathom.video/share/zVZJ3ZcycxTSLyhGyaX8q_AcyovSCE4Z?tab=summary&timestamp=2161.0)

## Topics

### GrowthX's Current Offerings and Needs

  - [GrowthX provides end-to-end content strategy and creation for clients (5-50 pieces/week)](https://fathom.video/share/zVZJ3ZcycxTSLyhGyaX8q_AcyovSCE4Z?tab=summary&timestamp=318.0)
  - [Looking for scalable ways to handle rapid growth and client onboarding](https://fathom.video/share/zVZJ3ZcycxTSLyhGyaX8q_AcyovSCE4Z?tab=summary&timestamp=74.0)
  - [Interested in subcontracting SEO audits, especially for pre-launch clients](https://fathom.video/share/zVZJ3ZcycxTSLyhGyaX8q_AcyovSCE4Z?tab=summary&timestamp=732.0)
  - [Target clients are typically Series A-B startups with 5,000-10,000 pages](https://fathom.video/share/zVZJ3ZcycxTSLyhGyaX8q_AcyovSCE4Z?tab=summary&timestamp=846.0)

### Botpresso's Capabilities and Tools

  - [Specializes in technical SEO, on-page optimization, and content strategy](https://fathom.video/share/zVZJ3ZcycxTSLyhGyaX8q_AcyovSCE4Z?tab=summary&timestamp=245.0)
  - [Offers a custom Chrome extension for quick on-page SEO audits](https://fathom.video/share/zVZJ3ZcycxTSLyhGyaX8q_AcyovSCE4Z?tab=summary&timestamp=444.0)
  - [Provides comprehensive SEO audits covering technical issues, content gaps, and optimization opportunities](https://fathom.video/share/zVZJ3ZcycxTSLyhGyaX8q_AcyovSCE4Z?tab=summary&timestamp=1456.0)
  - [Typical audit for a mid-sized site (10,000-15,000 pages) takes 50-60 hours](https://fathom.video/share/zVZJ3ZcycxTSLyhGyaX8q_AcyovSCE4Z?tab=summary&timestamp=1396.0)

### Potential Partnership Structure

  - [GrowthX interested in abbreviated version of Botpresso's full audit](https://fathom.video/share/zVZJ3ZcycxTSLyhGyaX8q_AcyovSCE4Z?tab=summary&timestamp=1912.0)
  - [Botpresso to create SaaS-specific SEO audit checklist and pricing options](https://fathom.video/share/zVZJ3ZcycxTSLyhGyaX8q_AcyovSCE4Z?tab=summary&timestamp=2161.0)
  - [Considering various pricing models (hourly, per-audit, or retainer)](https://fathom.video/share/zVZJ3ZcycxTSLyhGyaX8q_AcyovSCE4Z?tab=summary&timestamp=885.0)
  - [Typical partnership rate: €100/hour for 100 hours/month commitment](https://fathom.video/share/zVZJ3ZcycxTSLyhGyaX8q_AcyovSCE4Z?tab=summary&timestamp=1537.0)

### Client Examples and Scope

  - [Airbyte mentioned as a shared client (14,500 pages, considered mid-sized)](https://fathom.video/share/zVZJ3ZcycxTSLyhGyaX8q_AcyovSCE4Z?tab=summary&timestamp=1396.0)
  - [GrowthX average client: 5,000-6,000 pages](https://fathom.video/share/zVZJ3ZcycxTSLyhGyaX8q_AcyovSCE4Z?tab=summary&timestamp=1341.0)
  - [Botpresso has worked with direct competitors like AppyPy](https://fathom.video/share/zVZJ3ZcycxTSLyhGyaX8q_AcyovSCE4Z?tab=summary&timestamp=1363.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Botpresso to create and share SaaS-specific SEO audit checklist](https://fathom.video/share/zVZJ3ZcycxTSLyhGyaX8q_AcyovSCE4Z?tab=summary&timestamp=2161.0)
  - [Botpresso to provide pricing options for different audit levels](https://fathom.video/share/zVZJ3ZcycxTSLyhGyaX8q_AcyovSCE4Z?tab=summary&timestamp=1985.0)
  - [GrowthX to share details on current audit process and example client sizes](https://fathom.video/share/zVZJ3ZcycxTSLyhGyaX8q_AcyovSCE4Z?tab=summary&timestamp=2203.0)
  - [Both parties to review and discuss potential partnership structure and pricing](https://fathom.video/share/zVZJ3ZcycxTSLyhGyaX8q_AcyovSCE4Z?tab=summary&timestamp=2087.0)

action_items.description: Create & share SaaS-specific SEO audit checklist + pricing ideas for services
Share details of GrowthX's current audit process, client examples & approx. landing page counts
